identity.lead_description: Mother, father, childhood self, and adult self each anchor one part of the lineage arc.

wardrobe.change_policy: Each archival card preserves its own era-specific clothing.
locked_relationships: scene_001 keeps the beach bikini photo
scene_002 keeps the white tank portrait
scene_004 keeps the child-with-Santa holiday outfit
scene_005 keeps the gym T-shirt and shorts selfie

background.change_policy: Do not flatten the family montage into one repeated environment.

composition.framing: one still card per family beat
composition.look: personal heritage montage with editable labels

text.treatment: editable white text with black stroke positioned near the upper-right
editable white text with black stroke positioned near the upper-left
editable white text with black stroke positioned near the left-middle
editable white text with black stroke positioned near the upper-left
editable white text with black stroke positioned near the lower-left

text.pattern: Ignore TikTok watermark and username UI in remake media.

notes: All scenes can be handled as still-image-effect cards.
Keep the text plain with stroke only; the source does not use caption boxes.
